title: Track
description: A fused single-integrated-air-picture track, the unit of the COP. Cursor-on-Target aligned, JSON-native. Engagement eligibility is gated on trackQuality and identity (see docs/04).

trackId.description: Stable id for this system track across updates.

altMeters.description: Altitude in meters using altitudeReference; never infer the datum from frame.

altitudeReference.description: Vertical datum/reference for altMeters. MSL and AGL require a deployment-approved terrain/geoid source before conversion.

covariance.description: Positional uncertainty in a local East-North-Up tangent plane. Legacy *Meters fields and variance fields are one-sigma unless confidenceLevel states otherwise.

trackQuality.description: Track Quality (TQ) 0-15. The comparable score every node uses to gate engagement, independent of which sensors contributed.

identity.description: Combat identity from fused CID. Gates engagement together with ROE.

emitterState.description: RF emitter state from ESM/RF sensing. SILENT threats are invisible to RF sensors and cannot be RF-takeover'd; they must be found and defeated through other modalities (docs/03).

platform.description: Specific platform designation when known (e.g., MH-60R, F/A-18E, MV-22B). Optional.

service.description: Owning service/component for a friendly (Blue) track. Optional.

contributingSensors.description: Provenance: sensors whose current detections support this track. Cross-cue tasking may improve later observations; it never directly changes TQ.

timeObserved.description: RFC3339 time of the latest contributing observation. Effectors reject orders on stale tracks.

timeUpdated.description: RFC3339 fusion/update time. This can be newer than timeObserved while a track is coasting.

dataAgeSeconds.description: Producer-computed age of the newest contributing observation at timeUpdated. Consumers should recompute age as time advances.

measurementLatencyMilliseconds.description: Notional or measured latency represented between the newest source observation and fusion processing.

observationSequence.description: Monotonic per-track sequence incremented only when a new observation contributes.

fusionState.description: Fusion lifecycle; STALE tracks remain visible only until their TTL expires.

timeToLiveSeconds.description: Track ages out of the COP after this many seconds without update.

modelProvenance.description: Identifies notional/synthetic model provenance. It must not be interpreted as field performance evidence.
